title: Chestpacks
description: This Mod Adds 4 Unique Storage "ChestPacks" That You Can Equip On Your Back.
body:
This Mod Adds 4 Unique Storage "ChestPacks" That You Can Equip On Your Back.
The Higher Tier Your ChestPack Is The More Storage It Will Have. The Four Current Tiers Are Leather, Iron, Gold, and Diamond. Each Tier Having A Row Of Storage More.

\*\*\*THIS MOD REQUIRES CURIOS API!\*\*\*

*Crafting Recipes :*
